summary: LINE-integrated delivery ordering system for Love Pier Beach Cafe: LIFF login + GPS delivery-radius gate, distance-based delivery fee, PromptPay QR (company Bill Payment), automatic slip verification (SlipOK), LINE Flex order cards, and an admin backoffice for orders/settings.

sessionTasks.subject: Add delivery-fee calculation (util + admin settings + wiring)
Build locating animation (radar sweep, pulse rings, pin drop)
Build DeliveryGate (mandatory login + GPS gate before menu)
Write unit tests for haversine + delivery fee
Verify full flow in browser + typecheck/build, then commit+push

featureAreas.notes: 4-step checkout in components/CartDrawer.js (cart -> info -> payment -> success). LINE Login via lib/liff.js. PromptPay QR is a company Bill Payment QR (lib/promptpay.js), not phone PromptPay — Biller ID 010554511741402 for บริษัท เลิฟเพียร์ จำกัด.

pages/api/delivery-distance.js computes distance (haversine or Google Routes, chosen in /admin/settings) and delivery fee (lib/deliveryFee.js: base + per-km, server-side only). Out-of-radius customers are warned but not blocked (explicit shop decision).

components/delivery/DeliveryGate.js sits in front of /delivery only (not /menu). Forces LINE login then GPS scan with LocatingAnimation + DeliveryRadiusMap (Leaflet/OSM, no API key). Degrades gracefully if LIFF unset or GPS fails. Result cached in lib/deliverySession.js so CartDrawer doesn't re-ask.
Attach-slip button always shown; auto-verifies via SlipOK when configured in /admin/settings, otherwise stores the slip image (private Supabase bucket 'slips') for manual review in /admin/orders.

lib/orderFlex.js builds a Tassana-style card sent both customer-side (liff.sendMessages) and shop-side (Messaging API push to the customer) via lib/lineMessaging.js. Links to a public /order/[orderNo] status page.
/admin/orders (list + status dropdown + pending badge in sidebar), /admin/settings (distance method, shop coords, radius, delivery fee, SlipOK keys). Login: cafe.lovepier@gmail.com.

Both pages now render the same components/menu/MenuExperience.js (single source of truth) so future menu-layout edits apply to both pages automatically. /delivery adds showAddToCart + DeliveryGate on top.
vitest added (npm run test). lib/geo.test.js (haversineKm), lib/deliveryFee.test.js (calcDeliveryFee) — 10 tests passing.

knownBugsFixedThisSession: GPS error text froze in the wrong language (stale-closure i18n bug) — fixed by storing error codes instead of pre-translated strings, deriving text at render time.
Leaflet crash 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading layerPointToLatLng)' — fixed by calling map.setView() before circle.getBounds().
CartDrawer read lib/deliverySession.js only once on app mount (before DeliveryGate finished) — fixed to re-check every time the drawer opens.

followUps.item: Fix pre-existing React Compiler lint errors (unrelated to this session's feature work)
followUps.location: pages/reservation.js:181 (setState sync in effect), tweaks-panel.jsx:235/303 (ref access during render)
followUps.status: not started — flagged as a separate background task, not yet applied

followUps.item: SlipOK not yet configured in production
followUps.detail: slipok_api_key / slipok_branch_id are empty in the settings table — slips are stored for manual review until the shop signs up at slipok.com and enters keys in /admin/settings.

followUps.item: Google Routes API not yet configured
followUps.detail: distance_method is 'straight' (free haversine). Switch to 'google' in /admin/settings + add a Google Maps API key for real driving-distance.
Delivery fee feature is live but set to charge nothing until the shop sets real values in /admin/settings.
